name: Pumpkin Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients, except for the butter, in the order listed and cook to a very firm ball stage.
2. Add the butter once the mixture reaches the desired temperature.
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
4. Beat until it begins to take on a dull appearance.
5. Pour into a buttered pan. (To make persimmon fudge, use 3/4 cup persimmon pulp instead of pumpkin pie mix.)
